consent.bannerText: we use cookies to make the shared closet work, and — with your permission — to understand how it's used and show you relevant things.
consent.essentialsDesc: required for the site to function — sign-in, cart, and your consent choice itself.
consent.marketingDesc: used to measure and improve our marketing (Meta pixel).
consent.personalizationDesc: remembers your preferences to personalize your experience.
consent.analyticsDesc: helps us understand how the site is used (Google Tag Manager, Hotjar).
